en.welcome-msg: Welcome to Dodoma Vocational Training Centre – officially registered by NACTEVET with registration number
en.offer-electrical-discount: 50% Off on Electrical Installation Course - Enroll Now!
en.offer-evening-classes: Evening Classes Now Available - Flexible Schedule!
en.offer-job-assistance: Job Placement Assistance for All Graduates!
en.offer-early-discount: Special Discount for Early Registration - Limited Time!
en.about-subtitle: Dedicated to training competent professionals ready for the future workforce.
en.our-mission-text: Is to foster the success for our students through innovative and technological career. Oriented programs, structure, learning environment, flexible learning programs and flexible learning opportunities that promotes their excellence in a competitive global community.
en.our-vision-text: Is to become one of the leading Vocation Training Centre in prepairing Students who are innovative, creative, techinical, competent and skillful in thier respective careers in a competitive community.
en.our-values-text: Integrity: Honesty and ethics in everything we do; Excellence: Striving for the highest standards; Innovation: Creativity and new ideas encouraged; Respect: Embracing diversity and dignity for all; Collaboration: Teamwork and community engagement; Responsibility: Accountability in learning and actions.
en.featured-programs-subtitle: Explore our short and long courses designed to build your skills and career.
en.program-description-electrical: Learn the fundamentals of electrical installation and wiring, building practical skills for both residential and commercial projects.
en.program-description-ict: Learn the fundamentals of information and communication technology, including networking, software, and practical IT skills.
en.program-description-secretarial: Develop administrative and computer skills, including office management, document handling, and professional communication.
en.program-description-computer: Learn practical computer applications including word processing, spreadsheets, presentations, and basic IT skills.
en.program-description-hotel: Learn all aspects of hotel operations including Front Desk, Food & Beverage, Housekeeping, and Guest Services. Gain practical skills for managing and running hospitality establishments efficiently.
en.program-description-driving: Learn essential driving skills, road safety, and traffic regulations to become a competent and responsible driver.
en.program-description-english: Learn English grammar, speaking, writing, and comprehension skills for academic and professional success.
en.program-description-typing: Learn essential typing skills, improve speed and accuracy for professional and academic use.
en.program-description-painting: Learn painting techniques and signwriting skills for creative and professional expression.
en.program-description-hairdressing: Learn professional hair dressing techniques, styling, and salon management skills.
en.program-description-tailoring: Learn professional tailoring techniques including garment construction, sewing, and fashion design basics.
en.program-description-aluminium: Master techniques in aluminium fabrication and glass installation, including cutting, shaping, and fitting for windows, doors, and decorative structures.
en.program-description-masonry: Learn the fundamentals of masonry and bricklaying, including construction techniques, material handling, and site safety.
en.cta-description: Become part of our vibrant learning environment and gain practical skills for your future career.

sw.welcome-msg: Karibu Chuo Cha Mafunzo Dodoma Kilicho sajiliwa kwa usajili namba
sw.offer-electrical-discount: Punguzo la 50% kwa Kozi ya Ufundi Umeme - Jiunge Sasa!
sw.offer-free-toolkit: Seti ya Zana Bure kwa Usajili 20 wa Kwanza!
sw.offer-evening-classes: Masomo ya Jioni Sasa Yanapatikana - Ratiba Rahisi!
sw.offer-job-assistance: Msaada wa Kupata Ajira kwa Wahitimu Wote!
sw.offer-early-discount: Punguzo Maalum kwa Usajili wa Mapema - Muda Umewekewa Kiwango!
sw.about-subtitle: Tumejikita katika kufundisha wataalamu wenye weledi walioko tayari kwa soko la ajira la baadaye.
sw.our-mission-text: Ni kukuza mafanikio ya wanafunzi wetu kupitia taaluma bunifu na za kiteknolojia. Kupitia programu zilizopangwa, mazingira ya kujifunza, programu za kujifunza zinazobadilika na fursa zinazowapa nafasi ya kufikia ubora wao katika jamii ya ushindani ya kimataifa.
sw.our-vision-text: Ni kuwa moja ya Vituo Vinavyoongoza vya Mafunzo ya Ufundi Stadi katika kuwaandaa wanafunzi wabunifu, wabunifu, wenye ujuzi wa kiufundi, weledi na wenye ustadi katika taaluma zao kwenye jamii ya ushindani.
sw.our-values-text: Uadilifu: Uaminifu na maadili katika kila kitu tunachofanya; Ubora: Kufikia viwango vya juu zaidi; Ubunifu: Ubunifu na mawazo mapya yanahimizwa; Heshima: Kukumbatia utofauti na hadhi ya kila mtu; Ushirikiano: Kazi ya pamoja na ushirikishwaji wa jamii; Uwajibikaji: Uwajibikaji katika kujifunza na vitendo.
sw.featured-programs-subtitle: Chunguza kozi zetu fupi na ndefu zilizoundwa kukuza ujuzi wako na taaluma yako.
sw.program-description-electrical: Jifunze misingi ya usakinishaji na waya za umeme, ukijenga ujuzi wa vitendo kwa miradi ya makazi na kibiashara.
sw.program-description-ict: Jifunze misingi ya taarifa na teknolojia ya mawasiliano, ikijumuisha mtandao, programu, na ujuzi wa vitendo wa IT.
sw.program-description-secretarial: Tengeneza ujuzi wa utawala na kompyuta, ikijumuisha usimamizi wa ofisi, kushughulikia nyaraka, na mawasiliano ya kitaalamu.
sw.program-description-computer: Jifunze matumizi ya vitendo ya kompyuta ikiwa ni pamoja na maandishi, lahajedwali, uwasilishaji, na ujuzi wa msingi wa IT.
sw.program-description-hotel: Jifunze vipengele vyote vya uendeshaji wa hoteli ikiwa ni pamoja na Mapokezi, Chakula & Vinywaji, Usafi wa Vyumba, na Huduma kwa Wageni. Pata ujuzi wa vitendo wa kusimamia na kuendesha taasisi za ukarimu kwa ufanisi.
sw.program-description-driving: Jifunze ujuzi muhimu wa kuendesha gari, usalama barabarani, na sheria za trafiki ili uwe dereva mwenye ujuzi na uwajibikaji.
sw.program-description-english: Jifunze sarufi ya Kiingereza, kuzungumza, kuandika, na uelewa kwa mafanikio ya kielimu na kitaaluma.
sw.program-description-typing: Jifunze ujuzi muhimu wa kuandika haraka, boresha kasi na usahihi kwa matumizi ya kitaaluma na kielimu.
sw.program-description-painting: Jifunze mbinu za uchoraji na uandishi wa alama kwa uundaji na taaluma.
sw.program-description-hairdressing: Jifunze mbinu za urembo wa nywele, mitindo, na uongozi wa salon.
sw.program-description-tailoring: Jifunze mbinu za ushoni wa kitaalamu ikiwa ni pamoja na uundaji wa nguo, kushona, na misingi ya muundo wa mitindo.
sw.program-description-aluminium: Jifunze mbinu za utengenezaji wa aluminium na ufungaji wa vioo, ikiwa ni pamoja na kukata, kuunda, na kufunga madirisha, milango, na muundo wa mapambo.
sw.program-description-masonry: Jifunze misingi/ujuzi wa ujenzi ikiwemo mbinu za ujenzi, utunzaji wa vifaa, na usalama kazini.
sw.cta-title: Uko Tayari Kujiunga na Jamii Yetu?
sw.cta-description: Jiunge na mazingira yetu ya kujifunza yenye nguvu na upate ujuzi wa vitendo kwa ajili ya kazi yako ya baadaye.
